title: Pinbase Location Country
description: Frontmatter for a country-level location record

aliases.description: Alternate names and known variants (e.g. England, Britain, UK for United Kingdom; West Germany for Germany)

short_name.description: Abbreviated display name for condensed contexts (e.g. USA, UK)

divisions.description: Ordered list of administrative levels. Each entry is one type or a comma-separated set of allowed types at that level (e.g. 'state,district' to allow both states and DC-style districts).
